Class TopSongRowData

java.lang.Object
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto.TopSongRowData
public class TopSongRowData extends Object
Display DTO representing a single row in the Top Songs analytics view.

Holds the song title, primary artist name, duration in seconds, and a direct reference to the Song entity so that clicking the row starts playback immediately.

  • Constructor Details

    • TopSongRowData

      public TopSongRowData(String songTitle, String artistName, int durationSeconds, Song song)
      Data transfer object representing a single row in the top songs analytics view.

      Consumed by AnalyticsRowFactory.createTopSongRow(TopSongRowData) to render a song row in both the preview section and the paginated modal. Built by TopSongsViewModel.

      Parameters:
      songTitle - the title of the song
      artistName - the primary artist name for the song
      durationSeconds - the total duration of the song in seconds
      song - the Song entity reference used by the click handler to start playback
